title: Preimplantation Genetic Diagnosis (PGD)
summary: A technique used during in vitro fertilization (IVF) to screen embryos for genetic disorders before implantation. A single cell is removed from the embryo at the 8-cell stage; its DNA is amplified by techniques/pcr and tested with DNA probes for specific genetic conditions (cystic fibrosis, Huntington's, etc.). Only embryos free of the disorder are implanted.
